Input File is : transmitter.16_false-unreach-call_false-termination.cil.c

extern int __VERIFIER_nondet_int();

/* print_CIL_Input is true */

  {
  ERROR: __VERIFIER_error();
  return;
}

void immediate_notify(void) ;
void master(void) 
{ 

  {
  {if (m_pc == 0) {
    goto M_ENTRY;
  } else {
    {if (m_pc == 1) {
      goto M_WAIT;
    } else {

    }}
  }}
  M_ENTRY: ;
  {
  while (1) {
    while_0_continue: /* CIL Label */ ;
    {
    E_1 = 1;
    immediate_notify();
    E_1 = 2;
    }
    {
    while (1) {
      while_1_continue: /* CIL Label */ ;
      m_pc = 1;
      m_st = 2;

      goto return_label;
      M_WAIT: ;
    }
    while_1_break: /* CIL Label */ ;
    }
  }
  while_0_break: /* CIL Label */ ;
  }

  return_label: /* CIL Label */ 
  return;
}
}

int is_master_triggered(void) 
{ int __retres1 ;

  {
  {if (m_pc == 1) {
    {if (M_E == 1) {
      __retres1 = 1;
      goto return_label;
    } else {

    }}
  } else {

  }}
  __retres1 = 0;
  return_label: /* CIL Label */ 
  return (__retres1);
}
}

void init_threads(void) 
{ 

  {
  {if (m_i == 1) {
    m_st = 0;
  } else {
    m_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t1_i == 1) {
    t1_st = 0;
  } else {
    t1_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t2_i == 1) {
    t2_st = 0;
  } else {
    t2_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t3_i == 1) {
    t3_st = 0;
  } else {
    t3_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t4_i == 1) {
    t4_st = 0;
  } else {
    t4_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t5_i == 1) {
    t5_st = 0;
  } else {
    t5_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t6_i == 1) {
    t6_st = 0;
  } else {
    t6_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t7_i == 1) {
    t7_st = 0;
  } else {
    t7_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t8_i == 1) {
    t8_st = 0;
  } else {
    t8_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t9_i == 1) {
    t9_st = 0;
  } else {
    t9_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t10_i == 1) {
    t10_st = 0;
  } else {
    t10_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t11_i == 1) {
    t11_st = 0;
  } else {
    t11_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t12_i == 1) {
    t12_st = 0;
  } else {
    t12_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t13_i == 1) {
    t13_st = 0;
  } else {
    t13_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t14_i == 1) {
    t14_st = 0;
  } else {
    t14_st = 2;
  }}

  return;
}
}
int exists_runnable_thread(void) 
{ int __retres1 ;

  {
  {if (m_st == 0) {
    __retres1 = 1;
    goto return_label;
  } else {
    {if (t1_st == 0) {
      __retres1 = 1;
      goto return_label;
    } else {
      {if (t2_st == 0) {
        __retres1 = 1;
        goto return_label;
      } else {
        {if (t3_st == 0) {
          __retres1 = 1;
          goto return_label;
        } else {
          {if (t4_st == 0) {
            __retres1 = 1;
            goto return_label;
          } else {
            {if (t5_st == 0) {
              __retres1 = 1;
              goto return_label;
            } else {
              {if (t6_st == 0) {
                __retres1 = 1;
                goto return_label;
              } else {
                {if (t7_st == 0) {
                  __retres1 = 1;
                  goto return_label;
                } else {
                  {if (t8_st == 0) {
                    __retres1 = 1;
                    goto return_label;
                  } else {
                    {if (t9_st == 0) {
                      __retres1 = 1;
                      goto return_label;
                    } else {
                      {if (t10_st == 0) {
                        __retres1 = 1;
                        goto return_label;
                      } else {
                        {if (t11_st == 0) {
                          __retres1 = 1;
                          goto return_label;
                        } else {
                          {if (t12_st == 0) {
                            __retres1 = 1;
                            goto return_label;
                          } else {
                            {if (t13_st == 0) {
                              __retres1 = 1;
                              goto return_label;
                            } else {
                                {if(t14_st == 0) {
                                  __retres1 = 1;
                                  goto return_label;                                
                                }
                                else {
 
                                }}
                            }}
                          }}
                        }}
                      }}
                    }}
                  }}
                }}
              }}
            }}
          }}
        }}
      }}
    }}
  }}
  __retres1 = 0;
  return_label: /* CIL Label */ 
  return (__retres1);
}
}
void eval(void) 
{
  int tmp ;

  {
  {
  while (1) {
    while_15_continue: /* CIL Label */ ;
    {
    tmp = exists_runnable_thread();
    }
    {if (tmp) {

    } else {
      goto while_15_break;
    }}
    {if (m_st == 0) {
      int tmp_ndt_1;
      tmp_ndt_1 = __VERIFIER_nondet_int();
      {if (tmp_ndt_1) {
        {

void init_model(void) 
{ 

  {
  m_i = 1;
  t1_i = 1;
  t2_i = 1;
  t3_i = 1;
  t4_i = 1;
  t5_i = 1;
  t6_i = 1;
  t7_i = 1;
  t8_i = 1;
  t9_i = 1;
  t10_i = 1;
  t11_i = 1;
  t12_i = 1;
  t13_i = 1;
  t14_i = 1;

  return;
}
}
int stop_simulation(void) 
{ int tmp ;
  int __retres2 ;

  {
  {
  tmp = exists_runnable_thread();
  }
  {if (tmp) {
    __retres2 = 0;
    goto return_label;
  } else {

  }}
  __retres2 = 1;
  return_label: /* CIL Label */ 
  return (__retres2);
}
}
void start_simulation(void) 
{ int kernel_st ;
  int tmp ;
  int tmp___0 ;

  {
  {
  kernel_st = 0;
  update_channels();
  init_threads();
  fire_delta_events();
  activate_threads();
  reset_delta_events();
  }
  {
  while (1) {
    while_16_continue: /* CIL Label */ ;
    {
    kernel_st = 1;
    eval();
    }
    {
    kernel_st = 2;
    update_channels();
    }
    {
    kernel_st = 3;
    fire_delta_events();
    activate_threads();
    reset_delta_events();
    }
    {
    tmp = exists_runnable_thread();
    }
    {if (tmp == 0) {
      {
      kernel_st = 4;
      fire_time_events();
      activate_threads();
      reset_time_events();
      }
    } else {

    }}
    {
    tmp___0 = stop_simulation();
    }
    {if (tmp___0) {
      goto while_16_break;
    } else {

    }}
  }
  while_16_break: /* CIL Label */ ;
  }

  return;
}
}
int main(void) 
{ int __retres1 ;

  {
  {
  init_model();
  start_simulation();
  }
  __retres1 = 0;
  return (__retres1);
}
}

End Main

  {
  ERROR: __VERIFIER_error();
  return;
}

void master(void) 
{ 

  {
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(109, __func__);
if (m_pc == 0) { __VERIFIER_control_true(109, __func__);

    goto M_ENTRY;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(111, __func__);

    { __VERIFIER_reached_control(112, __func__);
if (m_pc == 1) { __VERIFIER_control_true(112, __func__);

      goto M_WAIT;
    } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(114, __func__);


    }}
  }}
  M_ENTRY: ;
  {

}

if(flag){oE_1=E_1;oE_10=E_10;oE_11=E_11;oE_12=E_12;oE_13=E_13;oE_14=E_14;oE_2=E_2;oE_3=E_3;oE_4=E_4;oE_5=E_5;oE_6=E_6;oE_7=E_7;oE_8=E_8;oE_9=E_9;oM_E=M_E;oT10_E=T10_E;oT11_E=T11_E;oT12_E=T12_E;oT13_E=T13_E;oT14_E=T14_E;oT1_E=T1_E;oT2_E=T2_E;oT3_E=T3_E;oT4_E=T4_E;oT5_E=T5_E;oT6_E=T6_E;oT7_E=T7_E;oT8_E=T8_E;oT9_E=T9_E;om_i=m_i;om_pc=m_pc;om_st=m_st;ot10_i=t10_i;ot10_pc=t10_pc;ot10_st=t10_st;ot11_i=t11_i;ot11_pc=t11_pc;ot11_st=t11_st;ot12_i=t12_i;ot12_pc=t12_pc;ot12_st=t12_st;ot13_i=t13_i;ot13_pc=t13_pc;ot13_st=t13_st;ot14_i=t14_i;ot14_pc=t14_pc;ot14_st=t14_st;ot1_i=t1_i;ot1_pc=t1_pc;ot1_st=t1_st;ot2_i=t2_i;ot2_pc=t2_pc;ot2_st=t2_st;ot3_i=t3_i;ot3_pc=t3_pc;ot3_st=t3_st;ot4_i=t4_i;ot4_pc=t4_pc;ot4_st=t4_st;ot5_i=t5_i;ot5_pc=t5_pc;ot5_st=t5_st;ot6_i=t6_i;ot6_pc=t6_pc;ot6_st=t6_st;ot7_i=t7_i;ot7_pc=t7_pc;ot7_st=t7_st;ot8_i=t8_i;ot8_pc=t8_pc;ot8_st=t8_st;ot9_i=t9_i;ot9_pc=t9_pc;ot9_st=t9_st;pStored15=myTrue;} 
    while_45_continue: /* CIL Label */ ;
    t14_pc = 1;
    t14_st = 2;

    goto return_label;
    T14_WAIT: 
    {
    //error();
    }
  }
  while_45_break: /* CIL Label */ ;
  }

  return_label: /* CIL Label */ 
  return;
}
}

}
void eval(void) 
{
  int tmp ;

  {
  {

 while (1) { __VERIFIER_loop_head(1100, __func__);

ot12_st;static int ot13_i;static int ot13_pc;static int ot13_st;static int ot14_i;static int ot14_pc;static int ot14_st;static int ot1_i;static int ot1_pc;static int ot1_st;static int ot2_i;static int ot2_pc;static int ot2_st;static int ot3_i;static int ot3_pc;static int ot3_st;static int ot4_i;static int ot4_pc;static int ot4_st;static int ot5_i;static int ot5_pc;static int ot5_st;static int ot6_i;static int ot6_pc;static int ot6_st;static int ot7_i;static int ot7_pc;static int ot7_st;static int ot8_i;static int ot8_pc;static int ot8_st;static int ot9_i;static int ot9_pc;static int ot9_st;static int otmp;if(pStored16){__CPROVER_assert(!(oE_1==E_1 && oE_10==E_10 && oE_11==E_11 && oE_12==E_12 && oE_13==E_13 && oE_14==E_14 && oE_2==E_2 && oE_3==E_3 && oE_4==E_4 && oE_5==E_5 && void fire_delta_events(void) 
{ 

  {
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1332, __func__);

    M_E = 1;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1334, __func__);


  }}

void reset_delta_events(void) 
{ 

  {
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1485, __func__);
if (M_E == 1) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1485, __func__);

    M_E = 2;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1487, __func__);


  }}
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1490, __func__);
if (T1_E == 1) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1490, __func__);

    T1_E = 2;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1492, __func__);


  }}
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1495, __func__);

    T2_E = 2;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1497, __func__);


  }}
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1500, __func__);

    T3_E = 2;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1502, __func__);


  }}
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1505, __func__);

    T4_E = 2;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1507, __func__);


  }}
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1510, __func__);

    T5_E = 2;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1512, __func__);


  }}
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1515, __func__);
if (T6_E == 1) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1515, __func__);

    T6_E = 2;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1517, __func__);


  }}
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1520, __func__);
if (T7_E == 1) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1520, __func__);

    T7_E = 2;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1522, __func__);


  }}
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1525, __func__);
if (T8_E == 1) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1525, __func__);

    T8_E = 2;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1527, __func__);


  }}
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1530, __func__);

    T9_E = 2;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1532, __func__);

void init_model(void) 
{ 

  {
  m_i = 1;
  t1_i = 1;
  t2_i = 1;
  t3_i = 1;
  t4_i = 1;
  t5_i = 1;
  t6_i = 1;
  t7_i = 1;
  t8_i = 1;
  t9_i = 1;
  t10_i = 1;
  t11_i = 1;
  t12_i = 1;
  t13_i = 1;
  t14_i = 1;

  return;
}
}
int stop_simulation(void) 
{ int tmp ;
  int __retres2 ;

  {
  {
  tmp = exists_runnable_thread();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1981, __func__);
if (tmp) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1981, __func__);

    __retres2 = 0;
    goto return_label;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1984, __func__);


  }}
  __retres2 = 1;
  return_label: /* CIL Label */ 
  return (__retres2);
}
}

{ int kernel_st ;
  int tmp ;
  int tmp___0 ;

  {
  {
  kernel_st = 0;
  update_channels();
  init_threads();
  fire_delta_events();
  activate_threads();
  reset_delta_events();
  }

    while_16_continue: /* CIL Label */ ;
    {
    kernel_st = 1;
    eval();
    }
    {
    kernel_st = 2;
    update_channels();
    }
    {
    kernel_st = 3;
    fire_delta_events();
    activate_threads();
    reset_delta_events();
    }
    {
    tmp = exists_runnable_thread();
    }
    { __VERIFIER_reached_control(2026, __func__);

      {
      kernel_st = 4;
      fire_time_events();
      activate_threads();
      reset_time_events();
      }
    } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(2033, __func__);


    }}
    {
    tmp___0 = stop_simulation();
    }
    { __VERIFIER_reached_control(2039, __func__);

    } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(2041, __func__);


    }}
  }
  while_16_break: /* CIL Label */ ;
  }

  return;
}
}
int main(void) 
{ int __retres1 ;

  {
  {
  init_model();
  start_simulation();
  }
  __retres1 = 0;
  return (__retres1);
}
}
